extensions.designPosture: Current proof-of-concept baseline, not final design destination.

headline.purpose: Application title only; not a marketing display style.

title.purpose: Compact section headings inside a dense product dashboard.

body.purpose: Explanatory copy, tables, metadata, and chart-adjacent text.

label.purpose: Small labels, table headers, import workflow states, and compact metadata.

motion.name: future-state-transition
motion.purpose: Future motion should communicate state changes only; no decorative page-load choreography.

rules: Treat current styling as proof-of-concept baseline, not the final design ceiling.
Use color semantically for health data, chart ranges, risk states, and workflow status.
Avoid gamified fitness-app language or visual treatment.
Elevation is intentionally unresolved until a deliberate redesign pass.

components.name: Panel
components.description: Flat content container for charts, tables, and metric groups.
components.css: .ds-panel { padding: 16px; border: 1px solid #d9dee7; border-radius: 8px; background: #fff; color: #22272f; } .ds-panel h2 { margin: 0 0 8px; font: 650 16px/1.3 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-panel p { margin: 0; color: #667085; font: 400 13px/1.45 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Metric Tile
components.description: Compact summary tile for scan-friendly numeric metrics.
components.css: .ds-metric { padding: 12px; border: 1px solid #eef1f5; border-radius: 6px; background: #fafbfc; } .ds-metric span { display: block; color: #667085; font: 400 12px/1.35 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-metric strong { display: block; margin-top: 6px; color: #22272f; font: 700 24px/1.15 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Segmented Tabs
components.description: Primary app navigation for Summary, Day Detail, and Journal.
components.css: .ds-tabs { display: inline-flex; gap: 4px; padding: 4px; border: 1px solid #d9dee7; border-radius: 8px; background: #fff; } .ds-tabs button { min-width: 112px; height: 34px; border: 0; border-radius: 6px; background: transparent; color: #667085; font: 650 13px/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-tabs button.active { background: #1f2937; color: #fff; }

components.name: Carb Marker
components.description: Dark blue circular chart marker showing carb grams at meal time.
components.css: .ds-carb-marker { display: inline-grid; place-items: center; width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 999px; background: #1f4f8f; color: #fff; font: 800 11px/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; }
